args:
set -eu
trace_dir=$(mktemp -d)
trace_path="$trace_dir/cache-invalidation.trace.fozzy"
fozzy run tests/build.cache_invalidation.fozzy.json --det --record "$trace_path" --json >/dev/null
fozzy shrink "$trace_path" --json | jq -e '.summary.identity.tracePath | endswith(".min.fozzy")' >/dev/null
printf 'shrink-cache-invalidation-regression\n'
